---
title: "研究亮点"
lang: zh
---

::: {.image-grid}
::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/NE_cover_2025.png" alt="Nature Electronics 封面">
  <figcaption>
    <div class="caption-description">用于信号处理的忆阻器片上系统（SoC）</div>
    <div class="caption-link"><a href="https://www.nature.com/natelectron/volumes/8/issues/7">_Nature Electronics_（2025 年 7 月封面文章）</a></div>
  </figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/ne_banner.jpeg" alt="Nature Electronics CeNN 芯片">
  <figcaption>
    <div class="caption-description">基于 CMOS 的细胞神经网络</div>
    <div class="caption-link"><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41928-025-01559-z">_Nature Electronics_（网站横幅及编辑推荐）</a></div>
  </figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/NS_sensing.svg" alt="Nature Sensors 新闻">
  <figcaption>
    <div class="caption-description">类脑感知系统</div>
    <div class="caption-link"><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s44460-025-00025-9">_Nature Sensors_（News & Views 报道）</a></div>
  </figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/NREE_dir.svg" alt="Nature Reviews Electrical Engineering 综述文章">
  <figcaption>
    <div class="caption-description">基于忆阻器的 AI 硬件加速器</div>
    <div class="caption-link"><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s44287-024-00037-6">_Nature Reviews Electrical Engineering_（邀约综述）</a></div>
  </figcaption>
</figure>
:::
